name: Generect B2B Lead Generation MCP Server
what_it_does: Official MCP server from Generect (generect org) for their B2B lead generation API. Enables AI agents to search companies, find leads, and access company data for sales prospecting through Generect's live business database. Designed for sales automation and outreach agents needing real-time B2B company intelligence.
use_cases: Finding B2B leads and prospects from sales prospecting agents
Searching company information and firmographics from CRM enrichment agents
Automating sales research and account intelligence from SDR agents
Building target company lists from marketing campaign agents
not_for: Consumer or B2C lead generation (B2B company focus)
HR or candidate sourcing (company/business data, not individual profiles)
Regions without Generect data coverage — check database coverage for your target markets
best_when: A sales or marketing agent needs to find B2B companies and prospects matching specific criteria — industry, size, location, technology stack — using Generect's live company database for outreach.
avoid_when: You need personal contact data at individual email/phone level (check Generect's coverage). Also: GDPR and CAN-SPAM compliance is the user's responsibility when using lead data.

auth.notes: Generect API key required. Register at generect.com for access.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Trial credits available; check generect.com for current pricing
pricing.notes: B2B data service with usage-based pricing. MCP server is free open source from generect org.

performance.rate_limits: API rate limits apply by tier; check generect.com documentation

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: B2B contact/company data — ensure GDPR/CAN-SPAM compliance in outreach workflows
Lead data quality varies by region — verify coverage for your target markets before purchase
Automated outreach using lead data can violate anti-spam laws — implement compliance checks
Official from generect org — purpose-built for B2B sales prospecting
agent_readiness.security_notes: PRIVACY: B2B contact data. GDPR applies to EU company data. API key auth. HTTPS. Implement compliance workflows before using lead data for automated outreach.

security_score_components.security_notes: B2B data with privacy implications. GDPR compliant per generect policy. Implement consent/compliance workflows for outreach.
